calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Dalt Hotel, LP is present. Represented by Valerie Stadthman.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Terri Jones is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JUN-24-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
